_: Phase A baseline for the Apple-flash-memory adoption plan (.claude/plans/zesty-giggling-charm.md). Fill in the measurements section from one cold load. The sparsity section is filled in by scripts/measure-sparsity.py. See docs/perf/README.md for the capture procedure.

decision_gate._: Phase A → Phase B/C gate. Per the plan, decision_for(overall_mean_active_fraction): <=0.50 phase_c_worthwhile, 0.51-0.60 marginal, >0.60 skip.
